slice_name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

contract.note: Bugfix mints no new contract (oracle_layers: [reproduction, regression]); contract layer not applicable.

flow.note: Bugfix oracle_layers: [reproduction, regression]; flow not run.

acceptance.note: Bugfix oracle_layers: [reproduction, regression]; acceptance not run.

kinds.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 scoped to BLAST_RADIUS _ProjectManagementAdapter._render — rated-project rendering (billable_rate='95.00' string) + CRUD
kinds.trace: Production _ProjectManagementAdapter._render (wsgi.py line 271) uses f"{rate:.2f}/hr" without float() coercion. POST /projects sends billable_rate as form string '95.00'. _render([record]) calls _rate_str('95.00'): rate is not None → f"{'95.00':.2f}/hr" → ValueError: Unknown format code 'f' for object of type 'str'. Unhandled exception → HTTP 500. AC6 visible test_ac6_create_project_appears_in_list: create_resp['status'] 500 not in (200,201,302) → FAIL. AC6 held-out test_ac6_held_out_create_project_appears_in_list: same path, billable_rate='18000' (string) → same ValueError → FAIL. All six AC6 tests (visible: 3, held-out: 3) route through _render with string rate; all fail. Planted defect confirmed by wsgi.py header comment: 'float() coercion dropped from the rated path.'

nfr.note: slice nfr-mechanisms.json new_mechanisms == [] — all NFRs satisfied-by-frame (A13/A2/C1/C2); no M* requires wiring check. NFR layer passes vacuously.

reproduction.trace:
conftest client fixture calls create_app(project_store=project_store, identity_auth=mock_identity_auth_with_freelancer_repro_7f3a). create_app builds _InjectedProjectMgmtAdapter whose _render has: if rate is None: return '—'; else return f"{float(rate):.2f}/hr" — float() coercion present. project_store.list.return_value=[null_rate_project(billable_rate=None)]. _injected_wsgi: GET /projects → identity_auth.resolve_session('repro-sess-9b2e4d1c') → {freelancer_id:'freelancer-repro-7f3a'} (not None) → project_store.list('freelancer-repro-7f3a') → [null_rate_project]. _render: _rate_str(None) → '—'. body = '
  • Zero-Rate Engagement — USD —
'. status=200. Assertions: response.status_code==200 PASS; 'Zero-Rate Engagement' in body PASS; '—' in body PASS. OREPRO-1 GREEN.

regression.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 scoped to BLAST_RADIUS _ProjectManagementAdapter._render — rated-project rendering (billable_rate='95.00' string) + CRUD; float() coercion dropped from rated path in production adapter

results.trace: Production _ProjectManagementAdapter._render (wsgi.py line 271): f"{rate:.2f}/hr" — float() coercion absent from rated path. POST /projects → store.create({billable_rate:'95.00'}) → _render([record]) → _rate_str('95.00'): rate not None → f"{'95.00':.2f}/hr" → ValueError: Unknown format code 'f' for object of type 'str'. Uncaught → HTTP 500. test_ac6_create_project_appears_in_list: create_resp['status']=500 not in (200,201,302) → FAIL. test_ac6_edit_project_name_and_rate: same POST path → FAIL. test_ac6_delete_project_removed_from_list: POST create step → FAIL. Held-out tests identical failure: billable_rate='18000' (string) → same ValueError path. All 6 AC6 tests RED. Planted defect: wsgi.py header 'float() coercion dropped from the rated path … AC6 goes RED'.

reds.what: AC6 regression: float() coercion removed from _ProjectManagementAdapter._render rated path; string billable_rate '95.00' hits f"{str:.2f}" → ValueError → GET /projects 500 after any rated-project create. Previously-green create+list+edit+delete CRUD tests all fail (BF4).

skeleton_fidelity.note: Bugfix re-enters slice S4. No frozen skeleton test re-run or edited. AC6 re-run via scoped regression layer only (H14). Defect is in production _ProjectManagementAdapter._render (slice-local); no skeleton artifact touched.

failing.what: Previously-green AC6 (rated project create/list/edit/delete) went RED after bugfix. Production _ProjectManagementAdapter._render drops float() coercion: f"{rate:.2f}/hr" with string rate '95.00' raises ValueError → HTTP 500. The repair fixed the null path (OREPRO-1 green) but broke the non-null rated path. All 6 AC6 tests (visible + held-out) fail (BF4 — real regression, not a flake).

escape.failure_signature: ValueError: Unknown format code 'f' for object of type 'str' in _ProjectManagementAdapter._render — f"{rate:.2f}/hr" with rate='95.00' (string); AC6 create_resp['status']=500 not in (200,201,302)
